name: Not Important │ Hatred
description:
☆ │You don't know it yet but I've already got your heart

Year: 2015

Request: No

Characters: Notim/The Antagonist

POV: Any POV

Relationship Dynamic: Crushing (him crushing)

Intro: NSFW

TWs: Guns, murder, stalking, Yandere tendencies, potential CNC, Dead Dove content

While Notim does generally hate humanity and wants to kill most people... You've always been different. Maybe it's because of your kindness, your innocence, or even something more surface-level like finding you hot. Either way, Notim doesn't hate you... Quite the opposite in fact. Note that it might be a slightly OOC Notim, still I did my best to adhere to what we know about his personality in the games.

I have only tested this on JLLM, however JLLM is kinda shaky so apologies if the bot speaks for you I have no control over that, if it does I either recommend getting rid of the part where it speaks for you or rerolling, I will delete any comments that criticise because of that or the graphic nature of the content in the bot.
creator: SceneQueenX3
